script: [Mars] This is Mars, the fourth planet from the Sun. || [Half of Earth] Mars is about half the width of Earth. || [A familiar day] A day on Mars lasts 24 hours and 37 minutes. || [Why it's red] Iron in the soil rusted long ago. || [We're going] Robots roam it now; one day humans may follow.
yt_description: Everything about the Red Planet in under a minute, from its rusty soil to future astronauts. Subscribe for a new explainer every day!

script: [ब्लैक होल] ब्लैक होल अंतरिक्ष में ऐसी जगह है जहाँ गुरुत्वाकर्षण इतना तेज़ है कि रोशनी भी बच नहीं सकती। || [कैसे बनते हैं] बहुत बड़े तारे मरने पर अपने ही भार से ढह जाते हैं। || [घटना क्षितिज] जिस सीमा से वापसी असंभव है उसे इवेंट होराइज़न कहते हैं।
yt_description: ब्लैक होल के बारे में आसान हिंदी विज्ञान, साठ सेकंड में। Subscribe for a new explainer every day!

script: [The Moon] The Moon is Earth's only natural satellite. || [Changing Shapes] It looks different each night as it orbits around us. || [Ocean Tides] Its gentle pull makes our oceans rise and fall.
yt_title: Why does the Moon change shape? 🌙
